title: Otis and the Scared Little Seedling
synopsis: When Otis finds a tiny seedling that's scared to grow in the school garden, he learns how to be brave and help his new plant friend feel safe and happy.

pages.text: Otis loved his school garden. Every day, he watered the flowers and talked to the plants. One morning, Otis found a tiny green seedling hiding behind a big sunflower. "Hello, little one," Otis said softly. But the seedling looked very scared!

illustration.description: A cheerful Black boy with curly hair wearing a bright yellow t-shirt and blue overalls, kneeling in a colorful school garden. He's looking gently at a tiny, worried-looking green seedling with droopy leaves hiding behind a tall, smiling sunflower. The garden has raised beds with various colorful flowers and vegetables. The background has a textured paper-like quality in warm greens and blues.
illustration.alt: Otis discovering the scared seedling in the school garden

pages.text: "Why are you so scared?" Otis asked. The little seedling whispered, "I'm afraid to grow big! What if I fall down? What if nobody likes me?" Otis felt sad for his new friend. He remembered when he felt scared on his first day of school too.

illustration.description: Close-up view of Otis sitting cross-legged on the garden path, his face showing gentle concern and empathy. The tiny seedling has a sad expression with droopy leaves and small worried eyes. Other diverse children can be seen playing happily in the background - a girl with braids, a boy with glasses, and a girl with pigtails. The scene uses soft, comforting colors with rounded shapes.
illustration.alt: Otis listening compassionately to the scared seedling's worries

pages.text: "I know how to help you feel brave!" Otis said with a big smile. He brought the seedling fresh water and sang a happy song. "You are strong! You are special! You will grow big and beautiful!" The seedling began to feel less scared. Otis stayed with his friend every day, and soon the brave little seedling grew into the most beautiful flower in the whole garden!

illustration.description: A joyful scene showing Otis with a bright smile, watering can in hand, standing next to the same spot where a gorgeous, confident sunflower now blooms tall and proud. The flower has a beaming face and vibrant yellow petals. Other diverse children - including a girl with hijab, a boy in a wheelchair, and twins with different skin tones - are gathered around admiring the beautiful garden. The colors are vibrant and celebratory with golden sunlight streaming down.
illustration.alt: Otis celebrating with his friend who grew into a beautiful, confident sunflower

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did the little seedling feel at the beginning?
questions.explanation: The seedling was scared to grow big and worried about falling down or not being liked.

questions.question: How did Otis help the seedling feel better?
choices: He sang and gave it water
questions.explanation: Otis sang a happy song and brought the seedling fresh water to help it feel brave.

questions.question: What did the seedling grow into?
questions.explanation: The brave little seedling grew into the most beautiful flower in the whole garden.

questions.question: How did Otis feel when he helped his friend?
questions.explanation: Otis felt happy because he could help his scared friend become brave and grow.
